name: Deep Sleep → Enter
description: This action makes the given deep sleep component enter deep sleep immediately.

config_entries.label: Time ID
config_entries.description:
**Set together — all of these must be set, or all left blank:** `until`, `time_id`.

The ID of the time component to use for the `until` option. Only on ESP32.

config_entries.label: Until
config_entries.description:
**Set together — all of these must be set, or all left blank:** `until`, `time_id`.

The time of day to wake up. Only on ESP32.

config_entries.label: Sleep Duration
config_entries.description: The time duration to stay in deep sleep mode. If a template is used, it should return a value in milliseconds.
